55277045.title: Eugene V. Debs Award

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Annual award for unionism, social justice or peace

55277045.description: Annual award for unionism, social justice or peace
55277045.extract: The Eugene V. Debs Award is an award accorded by the Eugene V. Debs Foundation, in Terre Haute, Indiana, each year since 1965 (apart from 1972 and 2020), honoring a person or organization whose work has been consistent with the spirit, values, and legacy of Eugene V. Debs and who has contributed to the advancement of the causes of industrial unionism, social justice, or world peace.

categories.title: Category:Short description is different from Wikidata
